releaseNotes:
New: A one-time notice on first launch about what HazMat TV is and isn't. The Hub's Continue Watching row now shows a TV show's own poster instead of the specific episode's thumbnail (the show's own episode list still shows episode thumbnails, unchanged).

Fixed: text fields throughout Settings (User-Agent, UDP proxy, TMDB key, External EPG URL, EPG retention/update interval, rename playlist, group filter, PIN entry) trapped the remote's D-pad once focused, with no way to move on to the next field or button. They now hand focus off properly via the keyboard's Next/Done action.
